descriptor.description: Entry point of the workflow. Surfaces workflow inputs.
Reads a persistent configuration value from the tenant config store.

outputs.description: The config value (coerced to declared type).
True if the key exists in the store.
The config key that was read.

configuration.description: The config key to read, e.g. gmail.last_sync_date.
Value to use if the key does not exist.

descriptor.description: Sets variables using key-value pairs with placeholder resolution.
Reads emails from Gmail using OAuth2 refresh token. Returns a structured array of emails with subject, sender, date, and body.

inputs.description: Override the query config at runtime — wire from a Read Config or Set Variable node.

outputs.description: JSON array of email objects: [{id, threadId, subject, from, date, body, snippet}].

configuration.description: Name of a saved Gmail credential (from /api/gmail/auth/start). If set, clientId/clientSecret/refreshToken are not needed.
OAuth2 client ID from Google Cloud Console.
OAuth2 client secret from Google Cloud Console.
OAuth2 refresh token with Gmail read scope.
Gmail search query (e.g. is:unread, after:2026-05-01). Can be overridden by wiring the 'query' input from Read Config or Set Variable.

descriptor.description: Expands a JSON array into indexed outputs (item_0..N). Useful for fan-out processing of lists from previous nodes.

inputs.description: JSON array string (or serialized array) to iterate over.

outputs.description: Full JSON array string of all processed items.
Number of items in the array.
JSON string of the first item (convenience output).
JSON string of the first item.
JSON string of the second item.
JSON string of the third item.
JSON array emitted when loopMode=true; consumed by the engine to run per-item subgraph iteration.
Collected per-item outputs after the engine finishes looping (replaces _foreach_items in nodeOutputs).

configuration.description: Name prefix for per-item outputs (default: item).
Maximum number of items to expand (default: 50, max: 200).
When true, the engine executes downstream nodes once per item instead of fan-out. Requires a logic.foreach.end node at the end of the loop body.

When true, each node in the loop body receives all outputs accumulated so far in the iteration (e.g. ai.extract outputs available to integrations.http without extra wiring). Off by default to keep memory usage low.

descriptor.description: Extracts structured fields from unstructured text using an LLM.

inputs.description: The text to extract data from.

outputs.description: All extracted fields as a JSON object.

configuration.description: Comma-separated field names to extract e.g. 'name,date,amount'.
Built-in format rules. Merged with Format Instructions (custom rules append/override).

optionDescriptions.none: No preset rules. Use Format Instructions for custom rules.
optionDescriptions.financial:
Amount: numeric only (e.g. 150.00)
Currency: ISO 4217 code (USD, DOP, EUR…)
Date: YYYY-MM-DD
Category: Food | Transport | Utilities | Entertainment | Healthcare | Other
Store: merchant name only
optionDescriptions.invoice:
Amount: numeric only (e.g. 1200.00)
Date: YYYY-MM-DD
InvoiceNumber: alphanumeric string
Vendor: company name only
optionDescriptions.contact:
Name: full name, title-case
Email: lowercase email address
Phone: E.164 format (e.g. +1234567890)
Company: company name only

configuration.description: Custom per-field format rules appended to the prompt. Overrides preset rules for the same field. E.g. 'Amount: numeric only. Date: YYYY-MM-DD.'.
Which upstream output to use as the text source.

descriptor.description: Calls any external REST API endpoint with configurable auth (none, bearer, basic, api-key, OAuth2).
Marks the end of a ForEach loop body. Wire after the last node in the loop body. The engine collects outputs from this node as the per-item result.

inputs.description: All inputs are passed through as outputs.

outputs.description: All inputs passed through as outputs unchanged.
